name: openpos-desktop
description: OpenPOS desktop application powered by Electron and Preact

scripts.build:desktop: bun run prepare:bootstrap && bun run prepare:native && bun run build && HOME=$PWD/.cache/home ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron-builder npm_config_devdir=$PWD/.cache/electron-gyp electron-builder --dir
scripts.build:desktop:mac: bun run prepare:bootstrap && bun run prepare:native && bun run build && HOME=$PWD/.cache/home ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron-builder npm_config_devdir=$PWD/.cache/electron-gyp electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:desktop:linux: bun run prepare:bootstrap && bun run prepare:native && bun run build && HOME=$PWD/.cache/home ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron-builder npm_config_devdir=$PWD/.cache/electron-gyp electron-builder --linux
scripts.build:desktop:linux:appimage: bun run prepare:bootstrap && bun run prepare:native && bun run build && HOME=$PWD/.cache/home ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron-builder npm_config_devdir=$PWD/.cache/electron-gyp electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.build:desktop:linux:deb: bun run prepare:bootstrap && bun run prepare:native && bun run build && HOME=$PWD/.cache/home ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.cache/electron-builder npm_config_devdir=$PWD/.cache/electron-gyp electron-builder --linux deb
scripts.check: biome check src && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json
